description: A platform connecting coaches with clients for 1:1 and group coaching sessions

stories.title: Coach Onboarding Flow - Step 1: Basic Info
Coach Onboarding Flow - Step 2: Bio & Specialties
Coach Onboarding Flow - Step 4: Review & Publish
Availability Database Schema
stories.description: Create database tables for coach availability. Create 'coach_availability' table with: coach_id (FK), day_of_week (0-6), start_time, end_time, is_available. Create 'availability_overrides' table for date-specific exceptions: coach_id, date, is_available, start_time, end_time. Add buffer_minutes and advance_notice_hours to coach_profiles.
acceptanceCriteria: coach_availability table created with day_of_week, start/end times
coach_profiles extended with buffer_minutes (default 15), advance_notice_hours (default 24), max_advance_days (default 60)

stories.title: Coach Availability Settings UI
stories.description: Create /dashboard/availability page for coaches to set their weekly schedule. Show 7-day grid where coach can set available hours per day. Include timezone display, buffer time setting, and advance notice setting.
acceptanceCriteria: Each day: toggle available/unavailable, set start/end time
Copy schedule from one day to others
Buffer time between sessions setting (15/30/45/60 min)

stories.title: Bookings Database Schema
stories.description: Create bookings table: id, coach_id (FK), client_id (FK), session_type_id or session_type (JSONB snapshot), start_time, end_time, status (pending/confirmed/completed/cancelled/no_show), notes, created_at, updated_at. Add indexes for queries.
acceptanceCriteria: bookings table created with all fields
Status enum: pending, confirmed, completed, cancelled, no_show
Session type stored as JSONB snapshot (name, duration, price)
Foreign keys to users table for coach and client
Indexes on coach_id, client_id, start_time, status

stories.title: Booking Flow - Time Selection
stories.description: Create /coaches/[slug]/book page. Show coach's session types to select. Display available time slots based on coach availability, existing bookings, buffer time, and advance notice. Calendar view for date selection, time slots for selected date.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 1: Select session type from coach's offerings
Step 2: Calendar shows available dates (respects max advance days)
Step 3: Time slots shown for selected date
Slots calculated from availability minus existing bookings minus buffer
Timezone shown and can be changed by client
Continue button enabled when slot selected

stories.title: Booking Flow - Confirmation
stories.description: Complete booking flow with confirmation step. Show summary of selected session, date, time, price. Add optional notes field. For now, create booking with 'confirmed' status (payment integration later). Send confirmation details.
acceptanceCriteria: Confirmation step shows: coach name, session type, date, time, duration, price
Confirm Booking button creates booking record

stories.title: Coach Session Management
stories.description: Create /dashboard/sessions page for coaches. Show upcoming sessions list with client info, date, time, session type. Show past sessions separately. Quick actions: view details, mark complete, cancel.
acceptanceCriteria: Session card: client name/avatar, date, time, session type, status
Mark as Complete action (for past sessions)

stories.title: Client Session Management
stories.description: Create /dashboard/my-sessions page for clients. Show their booked sessions with coach info. Upcoming and past tabs. Actions: view details, reschedule, cancel.
acceptanceCriteria: Session card: coach name/avatar, date, time, session type

stories.title: Session Detail Page
stories.description: Create session detail page showing full information. For coaches: client details, notes, session history with this client. For clients: coach details, session info. Join Session button placeholder for video integration later.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows session: date, time, duration, type, status
Coach view: client info, client notes, past sessions count
Client view: coach info, coach profile link
Join Session button (placeholder, shows 'Video coming soon')

stories.title: Reschedule Flow
stories.description: Allow clients to reschedule confirmed sessions. Show available slots excluding original booking time. Update booking record with new time. Notify coach of change.
acceptanceCriteria: Same flow as booking but pre-selects session type
Original time slot shown as 'Your current booking'
Original time freed up for other bookings
Only allowed if > 24 hours before session (configurable)

stories.title: Cancellation Flow
stories.description: Allow both coaches and clients to cancel sessions. Confirm cancellation with reason (optional). Update booking status. Free up the time slot. Handle cancellation policies (placeholder for payment refunds later).
acceptanceCriteria: Optional reason dropdown (schedule conflict, emergency, other)
Time slot freed for new bookings
Cancellation policy text shown (e.g., '24 hour policy')

stories.title: Dashboard Navigation Update
stories.description: Update dashboard sidebar to include new pages: Sessions, Availability (coach only), My Sessions (client only). Show appropriate links based on user role.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar shows Sessions link for coaches
Sidebar shows Availability link for coaches
Sidebar shows My Sessions link for clients

stories.title: Availability Display on Coach Profile
stories.description: Show coach's availability preview on their public profile. Display next available slots (e.g., 'Next available: Tomorrow at 2pm'). Quick book button for popular times.
acceptanceCriteria: Handles coach with no availability set

stories.title: Stripe Integration Setup
stories.description: Install and configure Stripe SDK. Create lib/stripe.ts with Stripe client initialization. Add STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY to env. Create basic API route structure for Stripe operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Basic error handling for missing keys

stories.title: Coach Stripe Connect Onboarding
stories.description: Create Stripe Connect Express account flow for coaches. Add stripe_account_id to coach_profiles. Create /dashboard/payments page showing onboarding status. Generate Connect onboarding link and handle return/refresh URLs.
acceptanceCriteria: Start Onboarding button creates Stripe Connect Express account

stories.title: Transactions Database Schema
stories.description: Create transactions table: id, booking_id (FK), coach_id, client_id, amount_cents, currency, platform_fee_cents, coach_payout_cents, stripe_payment_intent_id, stripe_transfer_id, status (pending/succeeded/failed/refunded), created_at.

stories.title: Checkout Flow with Stripe
stories.description: Integrate Stripe Checkout into booking confirmation. Create Checkout Session with coach's Connect account as destination. Handle booking creation after successful payment. Update booking flow to require payment for paid sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Booking confirmation shows Pay Now button for paid sessions
Creates Stripe Checkout Session with session details
Uses coach's Stripe Connect account for destination
Success URL returns to booking success page
Cancel URL returns to booking page
Booking created with status 'pending' until payment

stories.title: Stripe Webhook Handler
stories.description: Create /api/webhooks/stripe endpoint. Handle checkout.session.completed to confirm booking and create transaction. Handle payment_intent.failed. Verify webhook signatures.
acceptanceCriteria: Updates booking status to confirmed on success

stories.title: Coach Earnings Dashboard
stories.description: Create earnings section on /dashboard/payments. Show total earnings, pending payouts, completed payouts. List recent transactions with details. Link to Stripe Express dashboard for full details.
acceptanceCriteria: Earnings overview cards: total, pending, paid out
Recent transactions list with date, client, amount, status
Shows message if Stripe not connected

stories.title: Payment Status in Booking Flow
stories.description: Update booking UI to show payment status. Display payment required badge on unpaid bookings. Show payment confirmation on completed payments. Handle payment failures with retry option.
acceptanceCriteria: Booking cards show payment status badge
Unpaid bookings show 'Payment Required' with Pay Now button

stories.title: Refund Flow
stories.description: Implement refund functionality for cancelled sessions. Calculate refund based on cancellation policy. Process refund via Stripe. Update transaction status. Show refund status to both parties.
acceptanceCriteria: Full refund if cancelled > 24 hours before
Refund processed via Stripe Refunds API
Refund amount shown in cancellation confirmation

stories.title: Messages Database Schema
stories.description: Create database schema for messaging. conversations table: id, coach_id, client_id, last_message_at, created_at. messages table: id, conversation_id, sender_id, content, message_type (text/system), is_read, created_at. Add indexes.
acceptanceCriteria: conversations table with coach_id, client_id, last_message_at
Unique constraint on coach_id + client_id pair
messages table with conversation_id, sender_id, content
message_type enum: text, system (for automated messages)

stories.title: Conversations List Page
stories.description: Create /dashboard/messages page showing list of conversations. For coaches: show client conversations. For clients: show coach conversations. Display last message preview, timestamp, unread indicator.
acceptanceCriteria: List of conversations sorted by last_message_at desc
Each row: other person's avatar/name, last message preview (truncated), timestamp
Unread indicator (dot or badge) for conversations with unread messages

stories.title: Chat View Component
stories.description: Create chat UI at /dashboard/messages/[conversationId]. Show message history with sender bubbles (left/right alignment). Message input at bottom. Auto-scroll to latest. Load older messages on scroll up.
acceptanceCriteria: Messages displayed with sender alignment (own right, other left)
Auto-scroll to bottom on new message
Load older messages pagination (infinite scroll up)

stories.title: Send and Receive Messages
stories.description: Implement message sending and receiving. Server action to send message. Mark messages as read when conversation opened. Poll for new messages every few seconds (real-time upgrade later).
acceptanceCriteria: Server action sendMessage creates message record
Message appears immediately in sender's view (optimistic)
Poll for new messages every 3-5 seconds
New messages appear without page refresh
Opening conversation marks unread messages as read
Conversation last_message_at updates on new message

stories.title: Start Conversation from Booking
stories.description: Add 'Message' button on session detail and coach profile. Create conversation if doesn't exist. Redirect to chat. System message on booking confirmation.
acceptanceCriteria: Message button on session detail page
Message button on coach profile page
Creates conversation if none exists between users
Booking confirmation creates system message in conversation
Handles case where conversation already exists

stories.title: Messages Navigation and Unread Count
stories.description: Add Messages link to dashboard navigation. Show unread count badge. Update badge when messages arrive.
acceptanceCriteria: Messages link in dashboard sidebar with MessageSquare icon
Unread count badge shows total unread messages
Works for both coach and client roles

stories.title: Chat Context Panel
stories.description: Add context panel to chat view for coaches. Show client info: name, past sessions count, upcoming sessions, quick links. Collapsible on mobile.
acceptanceCriteria: Side panel in chat view (coach only)
Past sessions count with this client
Quick link to book session for client
Quick link to client's session history

stories.title: Session Notes Database Schema
stories.description: Create session_notes table: id, booking_id (FK unique), coach_id (FK), content (text), created_at, updated_at. One note per session, private to coach.
acceptanceCriteria: Foreign key to bookings table (unique constraint)

stories.title: Session Notes Editor
stories.description: Add notes section to session detail page for coaches. Textarea with save button. Auto-save on blur. Notes private to coach.
acceptanceCriteria: Notes section on session detail page (coach view only)

stories.title: Action Items Database Schema
stories.description: Create action_items table: id, coach_id, client_id, booking_id (optional), title, description, due_date, is_completed, completed_at, created_at, updated_at.
acceptanceCriteria: Links to coach, client, optionally booking
title required, description and due_date optional

stories.title: Coach Action Items Management
stories.description: Allow coaches to create and manage action items for clients. Add from session detail. List in context panel. Mark complete, edit, delete.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Action Item button in session detail
Modal with title, description, due date fields
Action items list in chat context panel
Coach can mark complete or delete

stories.title: Client Action Items View
stories.description: Create page for clients to view and complete action items. Dashboard widget showing pending count.
acceptanceCriteria: List with filter: All, Pending, Completed
Client can mark items as complete

stories.title: Meeting Link for Sessions
stories.description: Allow coaches to add video meeting link to sessions. Display link to both parties. Placeholder for future native video integration.
acceptanceCriteria: Coach can add meeting link (Zoom/Meet URL) to session
Link field in session detail edit mode
Client sees meeting link on session detail
Join Meeting button opens link in new tab
Placeholder message about native video coming soon
